response:
Step 1: Identify the given values.  
Mass of the baseball, \( m = 0.15\ \text{kg} \).  
Velocity of the baseball, \( v = 40\ \text{m/s} \).

Step 2: Use the momentum formula.  
Momentum \( p = m \times v \).

Step 3: Calculate.  
\( p = 0.15\ \text{kg} \times 40\ \text{m/s} = 6.0\ \text{kg·m/s} \).

Step 4: Match with the choices.  
This corresponds to option C.

C
